campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review transportation funding investments, adopt a new policy about how city property can be used, and discuss efforts to fill open city jobs and keep employees.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority investment report for March 2026
New policy restricting city property use for federal civil enforcement
City job openings and employee recruitment and retention strategies

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing on April 15, 2026 to address concerns about cleaning up hazardous properties that the County had identified. The council approved a formal resolution to move forward with the abatement work and adopted new policies on technology disruption and a process for residents to request reasonable accommodations.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property cleanup ordered by the County
Adoption of resolution to proceed with abatement on identified properties
New Technology Disruption Policy replacing the previous version
New process for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, review the town's finances from March, and authorize several agreements and contracts. The council also approved a list of projects planned for the next fiscal year and considered grant applications.
keyTopics: Approved donations of automated external defibrillators (AEDs) for town use
Authorized a five-year services agreement
Approved construction contract with O'Grady Paving
Reviewed town finances and investment report
Adopted list of projects for Fiscal Year 2026-27

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming council agendas and review committee work plans. The council cancelled their May 26 meeting and prepared the June 2 draft agenda by discussing which items to add, setting time limits for discussions, and approving various community events.
keyTopics: May 26 council meeting cancelled
June 2 draft agenda being finalized
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan update
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan review
Council-sponsored community events approval

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026, to approve meeting minutes and hear public comments. The council selected and recommended applicants for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee applicant selection for 2026-27
Public comment period for residents
Meeting minutes approval
Upcoming board and commission agendas

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council met on May 19, 2026, to conduct regular business and recognize two important observances. The meeting included a ceremonial flag salute and highlighted Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
Review of April meeting minutes

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety Element, which guides planning through 2040, while also recognizing the Public Works Department during National Public Works Week and celebrating Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Health and Safety Element update for the 2015-2040 General Plan
Recognition of Public Works teams (roads, sidewalks, trees, facilities, transportation, sustainability)
Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month celebration
One or more agenda items were postponed to a future meeting

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara's Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, to discuss plans related to development or improvements in station areas around the city. The meeting took place at City Hall and was also available online for residents to participate.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting
Meeting held at City Hall Council Chambers and via Zoom

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held several public hearings on May 19, 2026, to vote on new city rules and approve a new permanent City Manager. The council considered urgency ordinances (fast-tracked rules), approved a site development permit amendment and map for a development project, and confirmed assessments related to a local improvement district.
keyTopics: New urgency ordinance and regular ordinance for Title amendments
Site Development Permit Amendment and Vesting Tentative Map approval for a development project
Assessment confirmation and ordering for local improvement district
Appointment of permanent City Manager

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council discussed plans to help residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles for electrification programs designed to help the city comply with air quality regulations.
keyTopics: Residential electrification status update — progress on converting homes from gas to electric systems
Proposed principles for electrification assistance programs
Air District regulation compliance — how electrification helps meet regional air quality requirements
Staff presentation and late-packet report on CEQA environmental review status
